title: Terracotta Expansion
description: This mod adds terracotta bricks and all stone variants to all colors of terracotta! Also adds coal and iron ore that can be found in terracotta mountains.
body:
![Terracotta Expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c21d1cced5a479f5d0259e4eed010b7477cd52d4.png)     
**Ever thought terracotta was a little boring? This mod attempts to add some relevance to terracotta and the badlands biomes.**

_This mod introduces all stone-type variations to all colors of terracotta. This includes-_
 
- Terracotta stairs of all colors
- Terracotta slabs of all colors
- Terracotta pressure plates of all colors
- Terracotta buttons of all colors
- Terracotta bricks of all colors
- Terracotta brick stairs of all colors
- Terracotta brick slabs of all colors
- Terracotta brick walls of all colors
- Chiseled terracotta bricks of all colors

_You may use this in a modpack, just let me know on discord at norman_82523!_
